summary: On November 22, 2022, there was a statistically significant spike in adverse event reports for amoxicillin, with 57 reports received compared to an expected 27.35.
notable_pattern: Reports from November 19, 2022, show a cluster of severe reactions, including anaphylactic shock, drug-induced liver injury, and toxic epidermal necrolysis.
confidence_caveat: This signal is based on a limited sample of 8 reports and should be further investigated before any clinical conclusions can be drawn.
